title: polygala glandulosa
intro: Polygala glandulosa, also known as Yuzuru or Purple Milkwort, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Polygala glandulosa include improved immune function, anti-aging effects, and potential treatment of various diseases, including cancer and cardiovascular disorders. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and stems are typically used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to promote overall well-being and longevity.
